title: triticum infestum
intro: Triticum infestum, also known as infested wheat, is a type of wild grass that is often found in areas with poor soil quality and is characterized by its coarse texture and brittle stalks. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Triticum infestum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Triticum infestum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
